faq.q: Can students from any academic stream apply for BBA?
faq.a: Yes. Students who have completed 10+2 in any stream — science, commerce, or arts — can apply for the BBA programme. A science background does not create any difficulty in studying management.

faq.q: Does the BBA curriculum include mathematics?
faq.a: BBA programmes do not typically include mathematics as a standalone course. Quantitative concepts are integrated within modules such as business statistics, financial management, and analytics where relevant.

faq.q: What is the typical starting salary for BBA graduates?
faq.a: Starting compensation for BBA graduates in India typically ranges from INR 1.6–6.1 LPA depending on specialisation, skills, and employer. International compensation varies by location and role.

faq.q: Can BBA graduates pursue an MBA?
faq.a: Yes. BBA provides an excellent foundation for MBA programmes at Presidency and other institutions. Many BBA graduates progress to MBA studies to develop advanced specialisation in their chosen management domain.

faq.q: Are government jobs accessible to BBA graduates?
faq.a: Yes. BBA graduates can apply for government positions through relevant competitive examinations in India. International students should check specific eligibility requirements for public sector roles.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available for international students?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

programs.name: BBA Aviation Management

hero.description: Prepare for a career in one of the world’s fastest-growing transport sectors. This three-year programme covers aviation operations, airport management, travel and tourism, and airline business strategy — equipping you with the specialised management skills demanded by the global aviation industry.

overview: The BBA in Aviation Management prepares students for the rapidly evolving aviation industry — a sector that has moved from government-controlled operations to a dynamic mix of full-service airlines, low-cost carriers, and private aviation services. The curriculum covers aviation fundamentals, airport operations, aviation safety and security, human resources in aviation, travel and tourism management, and airline business strategy. Unique features include personality development, foreign language training, first aid certification, and computer applications — ancillary skills that aviation employers specifically value.

India’s aviation sector is experiencing significant growth, with new airports under construction, airline fleets expanding, and passenger traffic increasing annually. This creates sustained demand for professionally trained aviation management graduates who understand both the operational and business dimensions of the industry. The programme produces graduates equipped for roles across airlines, airports, ground handling companies, travel management firms, and aviation support services.

faq.q: Does this programme train you to become a pilot?
faq.a: No. BBA Aviation Management is a management degree focused on the business and operational aspects of aviation. It prepares you for management roles in airlines, airports, and travel organisations — not for flight crew positions.

faq.q: What is the starting salary for aviation management graduates?
faq.a: Starting compensation typically ranges from INR 3–5 LPA in India. Salaries vary by role, employer, and location. International aviation roles may offer different compensation structures.

faq.q: Is foreign language training included?
faq.a: Yes. The programme includes foreign language modules as part of its focus on communication skills valued by the international aviation industry.

faq.q: What makes this programme different from a general BBA?
faq.a: Aviation Management adds specialised modules in airport operations, airline business, aviation safety, and travel management that are not covered in the general BBA. It also includes first aid certification and personality development training specific to aviation industry requirements.

faq.q: Can graduates pursue an MBA after this programme?
faq.a: Yes. BBA Aviation Management graduates can pursue MBA programmes in general management, aviation management, or related specialisations for advanced career progression.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available for international students?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

programs.name: BBA Business Analytics

hero.description: Combine management expertise with data-driven decision-making. This three-year programme integrates core business administration with analytics tools and techniques — preparing you to translate complex data into strategic insights that drive organisational performance.

overview: The BBA in Business Analytics combines core business management education with focused training in data analytics, statistical methods, and business intelligence tools. The programme recognises that successful modern businesses require professionals who can bridge the gap between data science and strategic decision-making. Students develop competencies in applied business analytics, data science with R, predictive analysis, programming for analytics, marketing analytics, financial analytics, and human resource analytics — gaining both the business acumen and technical skills that analytics-driven organisations demand.

The curriculum equips students with the ability to use statistical tools to navigate large business datasets, extract structured information, and support evidence-based decision-making. Students work with industry-standard analytics platforms and develop practical skills through real-world case studies, business simulations, and data projects. Bengaluru’s concentration of analytics firms, consulting companies, and data-driven enterprises provides direct access to internship and career opportunities in one of India’s most active business analytics markets.

faq.q: Do I need a strong mathematics background for Business Analytics?
faq.a: A moderate understanding of mathematics and logical reasoning is beneficial but not essential at entry. The programme builds quantitative and statistical skills progressively throughout the curriculum.

faq.q: What analytics tools are covered?
faq.a: Students work with R, Python, Tableau, Power BI, SQL, and advanced Excel. The curriculum covers both statistical analysis and data visualisation tools used by professional business analysts.

faq.q: How does BBA Business Analytics differ from BCA Data Science?
faq.a: BBA Business Analytics focuses on applying data insights to business management decisions — marketing, finance, HR, operations. BCA Data Science focuses on the technical aspects of data processing, machine learning, and programming. Business Analytics graduates work at the intersection of data and business strategy.

faq.q: What is the career demand for business analytics graduates?
faq.a: Very high. Organisations across every sector increasingly require professionals who can translate data into business decisions. Analytics roles are among the fastest-growing career categories globally.

faq.q: Can I pursue an MBA after this programme?
faq.a: Yes. BBA Business Analytics provides an excellent foundation for MBA programmes, particularly MBA Business Analytics, MBA Finance, or general MBA with an analytics specialisation.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available for international students?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

programs.name: BBA Digital Marketing

hero.description: Master the strategies that connect brands to audiences online. This three-year programme covers SEO, social media marketing, digital advertising, web analytics, and content strategy — preparing you for one of the most dynamic and in-demand career fields in modern business.

overview: The BBA in Digital Marketing provides comprehensive training in the strategies used to attract customers through digital channels. The programme covers search engine optimisation (SEO), search engine marketing (SEM), social media marketing, web analytics, the digital advertising landscape, and customer communication using new media techniques. Students develop a practical understanding of online marketing alongside insights into human and organisational dynamics — creating professionals who can plan, execute, and measure digital campaigns that drive measurable business results.

The curriculum covers technology platforms, content marketing, influencer strategies, email marketing, paid advertising management, and analytics-driven optimisation. Students gain hands-on experience with industry-standard digital marketing platforms and develop professional portfolios through live campaign projects. Bengaluru’s vibrant digital economy — home to digital agencies, e-commerce companies, and technology startups — provides an ideal environment for building practical skills and professional networks in digital marketing.

faq.q: What is the starting salary for digital marketing graduates?
faq.a: Starting compensation typically ranges from INR 3–5 LPA in India, with growth potential tied to specialisation and experience. Performance-based roles in digital marketing often include variable compensation. International roles vary by market.

faq.q: Are industry certifications included?
faq.a: Yes. The programme prepares students for certifications from Google, Meta, and HubSpot, providing industry-recognised credentials alongside the academic degree.

faq.q: Can I freelance or start my own business with this degree?
faq.a: Absolutely. Digital marketing is one of the most accessible fields for freelancing and entrepreneurship. Graduates frequently start agencies, consult independently, or build personal brands using the skills and portfolio developed during the programme.

faq.q: How does this differ from BBA Digital Business?
faq.a: Digital Marketing focuses specifically on marketing strategy, campaigns, and audience engagement through digital channels. Digital Business takes a broader view, covering digital transformation, e-commerce operations, and the management of digital-first business models.

faq.q: Can graduates pursue an MBA?
faq.a: Yes. Graduates can pursue MBA Digital Marketing or other MBA specialisations for advanced career development.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available for international students?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

programs.name: BBA Digital Business

hero.description: Build and manage businesses in the digital economy. This three-year programme covers e-commerce operations, digital transformation, data-driven strategy, and online brand management — equipping you with dual qualifications from Presidency University and industry-recognised certifications from IIDE, Google, Meta, and HubSpot.

overview: The BBA in Digital Business prepares students to operate, manage, and grow businesses in an increasingly digital economy. The programme integrates core business management with specialised modules in digital marketing, e-commerce operations, digital analytics, social media strategy, and digital business model design. Students develop the skills to transform traditionally run businesses into digital enterprises, manage online operations, and leverage data-driven insights for strategic decision-making across industries.

A distinctive feature of this programme is the dual certification advantage — students receive a BBA degree from Presidency University alongside industry-recognised certifications from IIDE (Indian Institute of Digital Education), Google, Meta, and HubSpot. This combination of academic credentials and professional certifications significantly enhances employability. Students gain hands-on experience managing PPC campaigns, social media platforms, content strategies, and e-commerce operations, building a practical portfolio that demonstrates their capabilities to employers and potential business partners.

faq.q: Is this programme suitable for students interested in family business?

programs.name: BBA Hospitality Management

hero.description: Enter one of the world’s largest and fastest-growing service sectors. This three-year programme covers hotel operations, food and beverage management, tourism, event management, and guest services — preparing you for a career in an industry that values people skills, operational excellence, and cultural fluency.

overview: The BBA in Hospitality Management prepares students for careers in one of the world’s largest service industries. The curriculum covers hotel operations, food and beverage management, front office management, housekeeping, tourism and travel management, event planning, and hospitality marketing. Students develop the operational, communication, and guest-service skills that hospitality employers value, alongside core business management competencies in finance, HR, and strategic planning.

India’s hospitality sector is experiencing rapid growth driven by rising domestic and international tourism, expansion of hotel chains, and the growing meetings, incentives, conferences, and exhibitions (MICE) industry. Bengaluru’s position as a major business travel destination adds local context to the programme. Students gain practical experience through industry placements, guest lectures from hospitality professionals, and exposure to operational environments. The programme produces graduates ready for management roles in hotels, resorts, restaurants, event companies, cruise lines, and tourism organisations.

faq.q: Does this programme include practical hospitality training?
faq.a: Yes. The curriculum incorporates industry placements, operational training, guest lectures from hospitality professionals, and exposure to hotel and event management environments.

faq.q: Can hospitality management graduates work internationally?
faq.a: Yes. Hospitality is a global industry. The management skills, service orientation, and cross-cultural competence developed in this programme are valued by hospitality organisations worldwide.

faq.q: What is the career demand for hospitality management graduates?
faq.a: Strong. India’s tourism and hospitality sector is among the country’s largest employers and is growing rapidly. International tourism recovery and domestic travel expansion are driving sustained demand for qualified hospitality managers.

faq.q: Is this programme related to BBA Aviation Management?
faq.a: Both fall under the School of Management and share core business administration modules. Aviation Management specialises in airline and airport operations, while Hospitality Management focuses on hotels, restaurants, tourism, and events. Some career paths overlap in areas like airline catering and travel services.

faq.q: Can I pursue an MBA after this programme?
faq.a: Yes. Graduates can pursue MBA programmes in hospitality management, general management, or related specialisations for career advancement into senior leadership positions.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available for international students?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

programs.name: BA Journalism & Mass Communication (Journalism)

hero.description: Master the skills to inform, engage, and influence audiences across every media platform. This three-year programme combines traditional journalism principles with cutting-edge media technology — offering five specialisation tracks that prepare you for careers across news, advertising, PR, film, immersive media, and digital content creation.

overview: The BA in Journalism and Mass Communication at Presidency School of Media Studies offers a cutting-edge curriculum that combines the core principles of traditional journalism with the latest advancements in media technology. Students engage in hands-on training across print, electronic, and digital media — mastering reporting, writing, editing, broadcasting, and real-time storytelling. The curriculum also integrates filmmaking, data journalism, mobile journalism, and social media management, equipping students to produce fact-based stories with impact across platforms.

The programme features five specialisation tracks enabling students to develop expertise in their chosen area while maintaining a holistic understanding of the media landscape: Digital Marketing & Advertising / Public Relations & Corporate Communication; Film, Television & Digital Production; Immersive Media, AR/VR & Interactive Storytelling; and Digital Storytelling & Content Creation. Through workshops, internships, and live projects, the programme prepares students for real-world media careers with skills in research, ethical reporting, broadcast techniques, content strategy, and audience engagement.

faq.q: What are the eligibility requirements for international applicants?
faq.a: Candidates must have passed 10+2 with 45% aggregate marks (with English) or equivalent. 40% for reserved category candidates. International applicants should confirm documentation requirements with the Office of International Affairs.

faq.q: When do I choose my specialisation?
faq.a: Students begin with core journalism and communication foundations before selecting their specialisation track. The specific timing should be confirmed with the school during orientation.

faq.q: Is the AR/VR & Immersive Media track available for all students?
faq.a: Yes. All five specialisation tracks are available as options within the BA JMC programme. The immersive media track is a distinctive offering that positions graduates for emerging roles in spatial storytelling and interactive content.

faq.q: What is the starting salary for journalism graduates?
faq.a: Starting compensation varies widely by role and platform. Entry-level media positions in India typically start from INR 3–6 LPA, with digital content and PR roles often at the higher end. Independent content creators have variable income potential.

faq.q: Can I pursue an MA after this programme?
faq.a: Yes. Graduates can pursue the MA Journalism & Mass Communication at Presidency or other institutions for advanced study and career progression.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available for international students?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

hero.description: Lead with Excellence. Our management programs prepare strategic leaders and business professionals to navigate complex organizational challenges and drive sustainable business growth.

about.title: About the School
content: The School of Management offers rigorous business education combining management theory, case study analysis, and real-world projects. Our programs develop leaders and managers equipped with strategic thinking, entrepreneurial mindset, and global business acumen.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To develop ethical, visionary leaders who create sustainable value for organizations and society in an increasingly complex global business environment.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide comprehensive management education emphasizing strategic thinking, ethical leadership, and business innovation, fostering professionals who drive organizational excellence and social responsibility.

faq.question: What are the career prospects for management graduates?
faq.answer: Our graduates pursue careers in corporate management, entrepreneurship, finance, consulting, HR, and operations across diverse industries. Many advance to senior leadership positions within 5-10 years.

faq.question: Is work experience required for MBA programs?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, 2-3 years of professional experience is preferred for MBA programs. This enhances classroom discussions and networking value.

faq.question: Do you offer internship opportunities?
faq.answer: Yes, all our programs include mandatory internships with leading organizations, providing real-world business experience and industry connections.

faq.question: What is the placement record?
faq.answer: Our graduates have a 95%+ placement rate with average starting salaries significantly above industry standards. Top recruiting companies include Fortune 500 organizations.

faq.question: Are there any executive or part-time options?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer executive programs designed for working professionals, with flexible schedules including weekend and online delivery options.

programs.name: B.Com Banking & Finance

hero.description: Prepare for a career at the intersection of banking, financial markets,and commerce. Thi three-year programme covers financial accounting, banking law, cost accounting, risk management, and security analysis equipping you with the knowledge and practical skills for roles in banking, insurance, and financial services.

overview: This programme equips students with the knowledge, skills, and professional attitude for a career in banking and finance. The curriculum covers financial accounting,cost accounting, banking law, financial markets, economics, risk management, securityanalysis, and derivatives. Students develop competencies across the full spectrum ofbanking and financial services — from retail banking and credit analysis to investment management and financial regulation. The programme includes an internship component to enhance practical skills and industry readiness.

Students also have the option to receive specialised coaching for the CAFoundation examination, providing a dual academic and professional development pathway. India’s expanding banking and financial services sector — driven by digital banking, fintech innovation, and growing capital markets — creates sustained demand for commerce graduates with specialised banking and finance expertise. Bengaluru’sconcentration of banking headquarters, financial services firms, and fintech startupsprovides direct access to internship and career opportunities.

programs.name: B.Com with ACCA

hero.description: Earn a globally recognised professional accounting qualification alongside your commerce degree. This three-year programme integrates the B.Com curriculum with the ACCA (Association of Chartered Certified Accountants) syllabus — offering exemptions from up to 9 ACCA papers and opening career pathways in 180 countries worldwide.

overview: The B.Com. ACCA programme integrates the university’s commerce syllabus with the ACCA (Association of Chartered Certified Accountants) curriculum — a globally recognised certification for professional accountants acknowledged in 180 countries. Students complete both their B.Com degree and a significant portion of the ACCA qualification simultaneously, earning exemptions from up to 9 ACCA papers.

The curriculum covers financial accounting, management accounting, taxation, auditing, corporate governance, business law, and financial reporting aligned with international standards (IFRS). Students are mentored by faculty including ACCA-certified professionals who provide guidance on global accounting standards, exam preparation, and career planning.

programs.name: B.Com with CMA (US)

hero.description: Earn a globally recognised management accounting qualification alongside your commerce degree. This three-year programme integrates the B.Com curriculum with the CMA-US (Certified Management Accountant) programme — preparing you for prominent roles in corporate finance, cost management, and financial planning worldwide.

overview: The B.Com. integrated with CMA-US equips students with skills in corporate accounting, including financial accounting, cost accounting, risk management, financial planning, and mergers and acquisitions. Students study the CMA-US (Certified Management Accountant) curriculum during the early semesters and prepare for its two examinations while completing their B.Com degree. This integration enables students to earn the CMA-US accreditation and qualify for prominent corporate finance roles upon graduation — combining an Indian undergraduate degree with a globally recognised professional credential.

The CMA-US qualification, administered by the Institute of Management Accountants (IMA), is recognised internationally and valued by multinational corporations for roles in financial planning, analysis, cost management, and corporate strategy. The programme covers financial reporting, corporate governance, cost management, internal controls, and performance management aligned with US and international accounting standards. Graduates emerge with dual credentials that demonstrate both academic foundations and professional competence to employers across global markets.

faq.q: What is CMA-US?
faq.a: CMA-US (Certified Management Accountant) is a professional credential administered by the Institute of Management Accountants (IMA) in the United States. It is recognised globally and valued for roles in corporate financial planning, cost management, and performance analysis.

faq.q: Can I complete the CMA-US certification during the degree?
faq.a: The programme prepares you for the two CMA-US examinations, which you study for during the early semesters. Sitting and passing the examinations during the degree programme is the intended pathway.

faq.q: How does CMA-US compare to CA or ACCA?
faq.a: CMA-US focuses on management accounting, cost management, and financial planning — primarily for corporate finance roles. CA and ACCA focus more broadly on financial accounting, auditing, and taxation for public accounting practice.

faq.q: Is CMA-US recognised in India?
faq.a: Yes. CMA-US is recognised by multinational corporations operating in India and valued for corporate finance, cost management, and financial planning roles.

faq.q: What are the typical career outcomes?
faq.a: CMA-US holders enter roles in corporate financial planning, cost management, performance analysis, internal audit, and strategy consulting at multinational corporations and financial institutions.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available for international students?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

programs.name: B.Com with CA Foundation

hero.description: Build the strongest possible foundation for a Chartered Accountancy career. This three-year programme integrates the B.Com curriculum with the CA Foundation syllabus — providing a structured pathway that combines academic commerce education with focused preparation for the Chartered Accountancy professional examination.

overview: The B.Com. CA Foundation programme is designed for students aspiring to build a strong foundation in commerce, accounting, and finance with a specific focus on Chartered Accountancy preparation. The programme integrates core B.Com subjects with the CA Foundation syllabus, providing a structured pathway for students aiming to become Chartered Accountants. Students study accounting principles, business law, taxation, auditing, economics, and quantitative methods — aligned with both the academic requirements of a commerce degree and the examination requirements of the CA Foundation.

The programme includes dedicated coaching for CA Foundation examination preparation alongside regular academic coursework, mock tests, and practice workshops. Faculty include seasoned professionals and practising chartered accountants who provide exam-oriented guidance alongside academic instruction. This integrated approach ensures that students complete their undergraduate degree with both academic qualifications and substantial progress toward their CA professional goal, saving time compared to pursuing the two pathways separately.

faq.q: Is this programme specifically for students who want to become Chartered Accountants?
faq.a: Yes. This programme is designed for students committed to the CA career pathway. The integrated approach combines academic study with dedicated CA Foundation preparation for maximum efficiency.

faq.q: When can I sit the CA Foundation exam?
faq.a: Students prepare for the CA Foundation examination during their degree programme, with coaching and mock tests integrated into the academic schedule. The specific examination timeline should be confirmed with the school and ICAI requirements.

faq.q: Is the CA qualification recognised internationally?
faq.a: The Indian CA qualification issued by ICAI is one of the most rigorous accounting qualifications globally and is recognised in many countries. It has mutual recognition agreements with several international accounting bodies.

faq.q: What happens if I don’t pass the CA Foundation exam?
faq.a: You still earn your B.Com degree upon completing academic requirements. The CA Foundation exam can be reattempted, and the academic knowledge gained during the programme remains valuable for commerce careers regardless of CA examination outcomes.

faq.q: What is the typical timeline for becoming a fully qualified CA?
faq.a: The typical pathway is CA Foundation (during B.Com) → IPCC/Intermediate → Articleship (3 years) → Final CA examination. The complete process typically takes 4-5 years after commencing the CA Foundation, depending on examination outcomes.

programs.name: B.Com Corporate Accounting & Taxation

hero.description: Develop professional expertise in corporate financial management. This three-year programme covers accountancy, taxation, financial markets, risk management, and corporate reporting — preparing you for careers in accounting firms, corporate finance departments, and professional practice.

overview: The B.Com. in Corporate Accounting and Taxation equips students with in-depth knowledge and skills in corporate accounting, taxation, and related financial disciplines. The curriculum blends contemporary subjects including accountancy, economics, management, banking, taxation, and law — preparing graduates to meet the challenges of modern business finance. The programme is specifically designed to train students for professional accountancy careers in chartered accountancy, company secretaryship, and cost management accountancy.

Students develop expertise in personal and corporate taxation, financial markets, accounting standards, financial management, banking, risk management, and derivatives. The programme combines theoretical instruction with practical exercises in financial statement analysis, tax planning, audit procedures, and compliance reporting. Graduates emerge with the professional knowledge base and analytical skills valued by accounting firms, KPOs, corporate finance departments, and regulatory compliance organisations.

programs.name: B.Com Business Analytics

hero.description: Combine commerce expertise with data-driven decision-making. This three-year programme integrates core commerce subjects with applied analytics, data science with R, and predictive analysis — equipping you to navigate data-rich business environments where analytical skills drive organisational success.

overview: The B.Com. in Business Analytics equips students with the skills to interpret business data using statistical tools and analytical frameworks. Recognising that modern businesses require professionals who can extract structured information from large datasets for efficient decision-making, the programme combines core commerce education with specialised analytics training. Students develop competencies in applied business analytics, data science with R, predictive analysis, programming for analytics, and domain-specific analytics across marketing, finance, and human resources.

The curriculum covers comprehensive analytics tools alongside traditional commerce disciplines — accounting, economics, management, and business law — creating graduates who understand both the business context and the analytical techniques needed to support evidence-based decisions. Students gain proficiency with industry-standard platforms including Python, R, Tableau, Power BI, and SQL through hands-on project work and data analysis exercises. This programme is particularly suited for students who want to combine commerce knowledge with analytical capabilities valued across consulting, financial services, and corporate planning roles.

faq.q: Do I need a strong mathematics background?
faq.a: A moderate aptitude for quantitative reasoning is helpful. The programme builds statistical and analytical skills progressively — advanced prior mathematics is not required for admission.

faq.a: Students work with R, Python, Tableau, Power BI, SQL, and advanced Excel across the programme.

faq.q: Can I pursue further studies after B.Com Business Analytics?

faq.q: What is the career demand for analytics-capable commerce graduates?
faq.a: Very high. Organisations across every sector need professionals who combine business domain knowledge with analytical capabilities — a combination that is relatively scarce and highly valued.

programs.name: B.Des Communication Design

hero.description: Shape how the world sees, reads, and interacts with information. This four-year programme covers graphic design, branding, typography, motion graphics, UI/UX, and interactive media — preparing you for careers at the creative heart of advertising, publishing, digital media, and brand communication.

overview: The B.Des in Communication Design focuses on the fundamentals of visual communication, enabling students to choose between graphic design and visual representation of information via electronic and new media. The programme provides an in-depth understanding of both pathways and their applications, including motion graphics, special effects, brand identity development, editorial design, and interactive digital experiences. Students develop proficiency with industry-standard tools including Adobe Creative Suite, Sketch, and prototyping platforms through studio-based projects, client briefs, and design competitions.

The programme follows the school’s common first-year structure before specialising from the second year into communication design disciplines. Students build professional portfolios through live projects, design workshops, and industry internships. Certifications in UX/UI, motion design, digital storytelling, and interactive media complement the degree programme. Bengaluru’s vibrant advertising, digital media, and technology startup ecosystem provides direct access to internship and employment opportunities with agencies, studios, media houses, and corporate brands.

programs.name: B.Des Fashion Design

hero.description: Create the garments and accessories that define contemporary style. This four-year programme covers fashion illustration, garment construction, textile innovation, trend forecasting, and sustainable fashion — preparing you for careers in one of the world’s most dynamic and expressive creative industries.

overview: The B.Des in Fashion Design enables students to develop technical skills in garment, apparel, and accessory construction while cultivating the creative sensibility to produce aesthetically compelling and commercially viable designs. The curriculum covers design principles, fashion illustration, pattern making, draping, textile science, trend forecasting, sustainable fashion practices, and fashion business management. Students progress from foundational design skills in the common first year through increasingly advanced specialisation in fashion across subsequent semesters.

The programme is supported by state-of-the-art design studios equipped with modern design software, digital printing tools, sewing and pattern-making facilities, and advanced textile labs. Students build professional portfolios through studio projects, fashion shows, design workshops, and internships with fashion houses and textile manufacturers. India’s thriving fashion and textile industry — one of the world’s largest — provides a rich context for study, with access to diverse traditional craft techniques, emerging sustainable practices, and a dynamic contemporary fashion market.

programs.name: B.Des Product Design

hero.description: Design the objects and experiences that shape everyday life. This four-year technology-driven programme covers concept development, CAD/CAM, prototyping, ergonomics, material science, and sustainable manufacturing — preparing you for careers in industrial design across electronics, furniture, consumer goods, automotive, and lifestyle products.

overview: The B.Des in Product Design is a technology-driven industrial design programme focused on creating digitally and technologically integrated products, with optional specialisation in lifestyle and accessory design. Students develop core skills in design principles, concept development, sketching, digital modelling (CAD/CAM), prototyping, ergonomics, material science, and sustainable manufacturing. The programme integrates studio work, tool-based learning, elective modules, real-world projects, and internships — all culminating in a professional portfolio that demonstrates industry readiness.

Students learn practical skills in 3D modelling, prototyping through 3D printing, laser cutting, and CNC machining, as well as material exploration across wood, metal, plastic, and textiles. The programme builds designers who understand the full product development cycle from initial concept through user research, iterative design, prototype testing, and production-ready specification. Bengaluru’s diverse industrial ecosystem — spanning electronics, automotive, consumer goods, and startup innovation — provides rich context for product design education and direct access to industry collaboration.

programs.name: B.Des Space Design

hero.description: Design the environments where people live, work, and experience the world. This four-year programme covers interior architecture, spatial planning, exhibition design, hospitality environments, and retail experiences — preparing you for careers in one of design’s most immersive and impactful disciplines.

overview: The B.Des in Space Design prepares students to create meaningful spatial experiences across residential, commercial, hospitality, retail, exhibition, and public environments. The curriculum covers spatial planning, interior architecture, material specification, lighting design, furniture design, environmental graphics, and design for human behaviour. Students develop the ability to conceptualise, plan, and execute three-dimensional environments that are functional, aesthetically compelling, and responsive to the needs of their occupants.

The programme combines studio-based design projects with technical drawing, 3D modelling, rendering, and material exploration. Students progress from the common foundation year into increasingly complex spatial design challenges — from individual rooms and retail environments to large-scale hospitality and exhibition spaces. India’s booming real estate, hospitality, and retail sectors — combined with growing awareness of design-led spatial experiences — create strong demand for professionally trained space designers.

faq.q: How does Space Design differ from architecture?
faq.a: Space Design focuses on the interior environment — the experience, aesthetics, materials, and functionality within built spaces. Architecture focuses on the structural design of buildings themselves. Space designers typically work within existing or new structures, creating the interior environments that occupants experience.

faq.q: What software tools are taught?
faq.a: Students work with AutoCAD, SketchUp, 3ds Max, V-Ray, and presentation tools for spatial design visualisation and technical documentation.

faq.q: What is the career demand for space designers in India?
faq.a: Strong. India’s real estate, hospitality, and retail sectors are expanding rapidly, and design-conscious consumers increasingly demand professionally designed spaces — creating growing opportunities for qualified space designers.

faq.q: What is the starting salary?
faq.a: Starting compensation typically ranges from INR 3–6 LPA in India. Established space designers and those working in premium hospitality and commercial sectors can earn significantly more.

faq.q: Can I pursue further studies?
faq.a: Yes. Graduates can pursue master’s programmes in interior design, spatial design, or design management at institutions in India and internationally.

faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

programs.name: B.Des Game Design

hero.description: Design the games that captivate and engage millions. This four-year programme covers game mechanics, level design, interactive storytelling, game art, and game development — preparing you for careers in one of the world’s fastest-growing entertainment and technology sectors.

overview: The B.Des in Game Design prepares students to conceptualise, design, and develop interactive gaming experiences across platforms — mobile, console, PC, and emerging platforms like AR/VR. The curriculum covers game mechanics, level design, interactive storytelling, game art, character design, world-building, user experience design, and game development using industry-standard engines. Students develop both the creative vision and technical skills needed to create games that are engaging, well-crafted, and commercially viable.

India’s gaming industry is among the world’s fastest-growing, driven by mobile gaming, esports, and increasing investment in game development studios. The programme combines the school’s common design foundation year with progressive game design specialisation, producing graduates who understand design thinking, player psychology, and the technical production pipeline. Students build professional portfolios through game prototypes, jam projects, and industry collaborations — demonstrating their capabilities to studios, publishers, and technology companies worldwide.

programs.name: B.Sc Multimedia & Animation

hero.description: Bring stories and ideas to life through digital media. This four-year programme covers visual effects (VFX), special effects (SFX), game art, 3D animation, character design, and interactive media — preparing you for careers in film, television, gaming, advertising, and the booming digital content industry.

overview: The B.Sc. in Multimedia and Animation covers multimedia design fundamentals, visual effects (VFX), special effects (SFX), game design, digital animation, and interactive media. Students develop proficiency in industry-standard software and hardware including Adobe Creative Suite, Autodesk Maya, Unity and Unreal Engine, and advanced sound design tools. The curriculum spans 2D and 3D animation, character design and rigging, motion graphics, VFX compositing, and AI applications in multimedia — building the technical skills needed for professional content creation across film, television, gaming, and digital media.

The programme is suitable for students without a design or arts background — it covers fundamentals from the ground up while progressing to advanced techniques in animation production, VFX workflows, and game art. Students create market-ready digital content through live projects, collaborative workshops, design challenges, and industry internships. India’s film, gaming, and digital content industries are growing rapidly, creating strong demand for skilled multimedia professionals who can deliver high-quality visual content for domestic and international markets.

programs.name: Bachelor of Fine Arts

hero.description: Develop your artistic voice through rigorous creative practice. This four-year programme covers painting, sculpture, printmaking, drawing, art history, and contemporary art practice — preparing you for careers as exhibiting artists, art educators, curators, and creative professionals in galleries, studios, and cultural institutions worldwide.

overview: The Bachelor of Fine Arts programme provides rigorous training in visual arts practice, developing students’ creative voice through sustained engagement with painting, sculpture, drawing, printmaking, and mixed media. The curriculum combines studio practice with art history, aesthetics, critical theory, and contemporary art discourse — producing graduates who can create, exhibit, and contextualise their work within the broader landscape of contemporary visual culture.

The programme benefits from the School of Design’s creative infrastructure, faculty expertise, and collaborative environment. Students develop professional portfolios through studio work, exhibitions, and engagement with Bengaluru’s growing contemporary art scene. The BFA provides a foundation for careers in fine art practice, art education, gallery and museum work, community arts, and creative roles that value strong visual literacy and artistic thinking.

programs.name: BA LLB (Hons.)
programs.degree: Bachelor of Arts + Bachelor of Laws

hero.description: Combine legal expertise with a deep understanding of society and governance. This five-year BCI-approved integrated honours programme blends political science, sociology, and economics with comprehensive legal education — creating socially sensitive legal professionals equipped for careers in litigation, judiciary, corporate law, and public service.

overview: The integrated five-year B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) programme provides a strong foundation in the political factors that influence policy and legislation, highlighting the intricate relationship between law and social problems. Aimed at creating socially sensitive sentinels of justice, this programme integrates courses in political science, sociology, and economics with comprehensive legal education for students who prefer to approach law from a humanities and social sciences perspective. The honours structure allows students to develop deep specialisation in one of five tracks: Corporate & Commercial Law, Criminal Law, Constitutional & Administrative Law, Technology & IP Law, or International Trade Law.

The curriculum spans ten semesters covering constitutional law, criminal law, contract law, property law, family law, administrative law, international law, labour law, environmental law, and legal research methodology — alongside the humanities foundation. Clinical and practical skills are developed through moot courts, trial advocacy, legal aid clinics, client counselling, ADR (Alternative Dispute Resolution), and mandatory internships. Students develop competence in legal research, communication, and technology — formulating reasoned legal arguments, drafting professional documents, and presenting them effectively using contemporary digital tools and resources.

faq.q: What is the difference between B.A. LL.B. and B.B.A. LL.B. at Presidency?
faq.a: B.A. LL.B. integrates law with humanities — political science, sociology, and economics — suited for students interested in litigation, public service, and social justice advocacy. B.B.A. LL.B. integrates law with business management — economics, accounting, and corporate strategy — suited for students interested in corporate law, business advisory, and commercial legal practice.

faq.q: What are the eligibility requirements for international applicants?
faq.a: Candidates must have passed 10+2 or equivalent with a minimum of 45% marks. Admission is based on CLAT, LSAT-India, or the Presidency University Law Admission Test (PULAT). Candidates above 20 years of age must furnish an undertaking.

faq.q: Can graduates practise law in India?
faq.a: Yes. Upon completing the programme and passing the All India Bar Examination (AIBE) conducted by the Bar Council of India, graduates are eligible to enrol as advocates and practise in Indian courts.

faq.q: What honours specialisation tracks are available?
faq.a: Five tracks: Corporate & Commercial Law, Criminal Law, Constitutional & Administrative Law, Technology & Intellectual Property Law, and International Trade Law.

faq.q: Are moot court and internship opportunities mandatory?
faq.a: Yes. Both are mandated by the Bar Council of India and are integral parts of the curriculum. Students participate in moot courts and complete internships with law firms, courts, corporate legal departments, and NGOs.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available for international students?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

programs.degree: Bachelor of Business Administration + Bachelor of Laws

hero.description: Where business acumen meets legal expertise. This five-year BCI-approved integrated honours programme blends management sciences with legal education — creating legal professionals for the growing opportunities in corporate law, business advisory, and commercial legal practice across global markets.

overview: The integrated five-year B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) programme blends management sciences and legal education to create legal professionals for the increasing opportunities in corporate and business contexts. The core essentials of general management, coupled with a sound understanding of economics, accounting, strategic management, and human resource management, make this honours law curriculum an ideal choice for students who desire to make careers as legal professionals in the demanding context of global business. The programme spans ten semesters with the same five honours specialisation tracks available as in the B.A. LL.B. programme.

Beyond traditional legal education, the programme develops competence in corporate negotiation, contract drafting, entrepreneurship clinics, startup legal support, arbitration practice, and management internships — integrating business strategy with legal expertise. Students gain practical experience through the same clinical programme of moot courts, legal aid, and mandatory internships, while the business management modules add a distinctive commercial dimension. Graduates emerge uniquely positioned for roles where legal knowledge and business understanding must converge — corporate legal departments, commercial law firms, investment banking compliance, startup advisory, and international trade law.

faq.q: How does B.B.A. LL.B. differ from B.A. LL.B.?
faq.a: B.B.A. LL.B. integrates business management with law — ideal for corporate law, business advisory, and commercial practice. B.A. LL.B. integrates humanities with law — ideal for litigation, public service, and social justice advocacy. Both share the same legal core and honours tracks.

faq.q: Is the B.B.A. LL.B. suitable for students interested in corporate careers?
faq.a: Yes. The programme is specifically designed for students who want to combine legal expertise with business understanding — particularly relevant for roles in corporate legal departments, commercial law firms, investment banking compliance, and startup advisory.

programs.name: LL.M (Master of Laws)

hero.description: Deepen your legal expertise and advance your career through postgraduate specialisation. This one-year programme offers advanced study across five specialisation tracks — IPR & Technology Law, International Law, Criminal Law, Corporate Law, and Constitutional & Administrative Law — preparing you for leadership in legal practice, academia, and policy.

overview: The Master of Laws programme deepens legal knowledge across five specialisation tracks, emphasising advanced research, critical analysis, and scholarly writing. The programme prepares students for roles as legal scholars, senior practitioners, policy advisors, and academic leaders. IPR and Technology Law addresses the evolving interface between law and technology — including cloud computing, biotechnological inventions, big data, and traditional knowledge. International Law covers the laws of peace, war, refugees, humanitarian law, and conflict of laws. Criminal Law addresses cyber crime, digital forensics, evidence law, and sentencing reform. Corporate Law covers investment law, international commercial transactions, and commercial arbitration. Constitutional and Administrative Law covers writs, public services, national security, and environmental constitutionalism.

The programme includes practical experience through internships, seminars, and research projects, helping students apply theory to real-world legal situations. Admission is based on merit in the qualifying degree and scores from relevant entrance examinations, combined with an interview conducted by Presidency University's Centre for Post-Graduate Legal Studies (CPGLS). Graduates are well-equipped for leadership roles in legal practice, academia, international organisations, and policy institutions — with expertise in navigating the most complex legal challenges of the contemporary world.

faq.q: What are the eligibility requirements for international LL.M. applicants?
faq.a: Applicants need a 3-year LLB degree or a 5-year integrated law degree from a recognised university with a minimum of 50% marks (45% for reserved categories). Admission is based on qualifying degree merit, entrance test scores, and a university interview.

faq.q: Which specialisation should I choose?
faq.a: Choose based on your career objectives. IPR & Technology Law suits those interested in tech law, patents, and digital regulation. International Law suits those targeting international organisations and diplomacy. Criminal Law suits those interested in prosecution, defence, or criminal justice reform. Corporate Law suits those targeting commercial practice and business transactions. Constitutional Law suits those interested in governance, public interest litigation, and administrative law.

faq.q: Can the LL.M. lead to doctoral research?
faq.a: Yes. The LL.M. provides excellent preparation for Ph.D. programmes in law at Presidency and other institutions, through its emphasis on advanced research skills and scholarly writing.

faq.q: Is the LL.M. recognised for teaching positions?
faq.a: Yes. The LL.M. is a standard qualification for teaching law at universities and law schools in India. It meets the academic requirements for entry-level faculty positions at most institutions.

faq.q: What is the Centre for Post-Graduate Legal Studies (CPGLS)?
faq.a: CPGLS is the postgraduate arm of the School of Law responsible for administering the LL.M. programme, including admissions, curriculum, and research supervision.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available for international students?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

hero.description: Tell Stories That Matter. Our media programs prepare journalists, broadcasters, and media professionals to inform, inspire, and influence through ethical, impactful communication.

about.title: About the School
content: The School of Media Studies offers comprehensive education in journalism, broadcasting, digital media, and mass communication. Our programs combine media theory, professional skills, and hands-on experience in state-of-the-art facilities, preparing students for evolving media landscapes.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To develop responsible, skilled media professionals who uphold journalistic integrity and drive meaningful communication in society.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide comprehensive media education combining journalistic principles, digital innovation, and multimedia skills, fostering professionals committed to ethical, impactful storytelling.

faq.question: What is the difference between journalism and mass communication programs?
faq.answer: Journalism focuses on news reporting and editorial skills, while mass communication provides broader media education including advertising, PR, and media management.

faq.question: Do you have media labs and broadcast facilities?
faq.answer: Yes, we have fully equipped studios, editing labs, broadcast facilities, and digital media labs with professional-grade equipment for hands-on training.

faq.question: Are there internship opportunities with media organizations?
faq.answer: Yes, partnerships with leading news channels, newspapers, digital media platforms, and PR agencies provide excellent internship opportunities.

faq.question: What are career options after graduation?
faq.answer: Careers as journalists, news anchors, content creators, producers, media managers, PR professionals, and digital media specialists with news outlets and media companies.

faq.question: Is knowledge of multiple languages helpful?
faq.answer: Yes, proficiency in English, Hindi, and regional languages is advantageous in India's diverse media landscape.

programs.name: B.Sc Psychology

hero.description: Understand the science of human behaviour, cognition, and emotion. This three-year programme covers psychological theory, research methods, developmental psychology, abnormal psychology, and applied practice — preparing you for careers in counselling, clinical practice, organisational psychology, and research.

overview: The B.Sc. in Psychology provides a scientific foundation in the study of human behaviour, cognition, emotion, and mental processes. The curriculum covers core areas including developmental psychology, social psychology, abnormal psychology, cognitive psychology, research methodology, and statistical analysis. Students develop competencies in understanding human behaviour through both theoretical frameworks and empirical research methods — building the analytical and observational skills essential for careers across psychology, counselling, human resources, and social services.

The programme combines classroom instruction with laboratory work, case study analysis, and field exposure. Students engage with contemporary topics including mental health awareness, workplace psychology, child development, and psychological assessment. This standalone B.Sc. provides a comprehensive scientific grounding in psychology, distinct from the dual-discipline B.A. combinations that pair psychology with other humanities subjects. It serves as the primary pathway for students seeking to progress to the M.Sc. Psychology and professional practice in clinical, counselling, or industrial psychology.

eligibility.title: Eligibility

faq.q: What are the eligibility requirements?
faq.a: Candidates must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate marks. International applicants should confirm requirements with the Office of International Affairs.

faq.q: Can I become a clinical psychologist with this degree?
faq.a: The B.Sc. provides the foundation. To practise as a clinical psychologist in India, you would typically need to complete the M.Sc. Psychology (Clinical specialisation) and further supervised training. This B.Sc. is the first step on that pathway.

faq.q: How does B.Sc. Psychology differ from the B.A. combinations with Psychology?
faq.a: B.Sc. Psychology is a standalone science-focused programme providing comprehensive depth in psychology. The B.A. combinations pair psychology with a second discipline (economics, English, performing arts, etc.) for interdisciplinary breadth. Choose B.Sc. if you want maximum psychology depth; choose a B.A. combination if you want dual-discipline breadth.

faq.q: Is on-campus accommodation available?
faq.a: Presidency University provides student housing. Contact the Office of International Affairs for details.

programs.name: M.Sc Psychology

hero.description: Advance your understanding of human behaviour through postgraduate specialisation. Choose from four tracks — Child Psychology, Clinical Psychology, Counselling Psychology, or Industrial Psychology — and develop the advanced competencies needed for professional psychological practice, research, and academic careers.

overview: The M.Sc. in Psychology provides advanced postgraduate education across four specialisation tracks — Child, Clinical, Counselling, and Industrial Psychology. Each track develops deep expertise in the chosen domain while maintaining a strong foundation in psychological research methodology, advanced statistics, and ethical practice. Students engage with contemporary psychological theories, evidence-based assessment techniques, and therapeutic or organisational interventions relevant to their specialisation.

The programme combines academic instruction with supervised practical experience, case studies, and research projects. Clinical and counselling tracks include practicum components in therapeutic settings. The industrial psychology track connects with organisational practice through corporate projects and HR collaborations. Graduates are prepared for professional practice, research careers, and academic positions — and the programme provides a strong foundation for doctoral study in psychology.

faq.a: Choose based on your career goals. Clinical Psychology for therapeutic practice with mental health conditions. Counselling Psychology for supportive counselling and guidance. programs.name: MA English

hero.description: Deepen your engagement with literature, language, and culture through postgraduate specialisation. Choose from Digital Humanities, Cultural Studies, Creative Writing, or Educational Leadership — and develop advanced competencies for careers in academia, publishing, media, education, and cultural institutions.

overview: The M.A. in English provides advanced postgraduate study in literature, language, and culture with four distinctive specialisation tracks. Digital Humanities explores the intersection of technology and literary scholarship. Cultural Studies engages with contemporary cultural theory, identity, and representation. Creative Writing develops professional authorial and editorial skills. Educational Leadership prepares graduates for leadership roles in educational institutions and policy development.

All tracks share a foundation in advanced literary analysis, critical theory, research methodology, and academic writing. The programme prepares graduates for academic careers, doctoral research, publishing, media, cultural organisations, and educational leadership. The educational leadership track is particularly distinctive, combining English studies with institutional management and pedagogical innovation for careers in education administration. The M.A. English at Presidency University offers a rich interdisciplinary environment, connecting with performing arts, sociology, economics, and psychology across

hero.description: Think Critically, Act Responsibly. Our liberal arts programs develop intellectually versatile professionals who approach complex problems from multiple perspectives and drive meaningful change.

about.title: About the School
content: The School of Liberal Arts & Sciences offers interdisciplinary education combining humanities, social sciences, natural sciences, and professional studies. Our programs develop critical thinkers and versatile professionals prepared for evolving careers and engaged global citizenship.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To cultivate intellectually engaged citizens and professionals who think critically, communicate effectively, and contribute meaningfully to society.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide comprehensive liberal arts education emphasizing critical thinking, interdisciplinary learning, and global perspectives, developing versatile professionals prepared for diverse careers.

programPreview.title: Our Programs
programPreview.subtitle: Interdisciplinary Education in Humanities, Sciences & Social Studies

faq.question: What is liberal arts education?
faq.answer: Liberal arts education emphasizes broad intellectual learning across humanities, sciences, and social sciences, developing critical thinking, communication, and problem-solving skills applicable to diverse careers.

faq.question: Can I pursue a BA in a single subject or must I combine subjects?
faq.answer: Both options are available. You can specialize in one subject (Honours) or pursue an interdisciplinary approach combining multiple subjects.

faq.question: What career options are available for liberal arts graduates?
faq.answer: Diverse career paths in education, journalism, civil service, NGOs, business, law, research, and public policy. The versatile skills prepare graduates for many professional fields.

faq.question: Do you encourage interdisciplinary learning?
faq.answer: Yes, our curriculum encourages students to combine subjects and learn across disciplines, developing well-rounded, versatile professionals.

faq.question: Are there opportunities for research and internships?
faq.answer: Yes, research opportunities, internships with NGOs, media organizations, government agencies, and corporate partners are integrated into our programs.

programSections.title: Undergraduate Programmes
programSections.subtitle: Build strong foundations in your field of interest

programSections.title: Postgraduate Programmes
programSections.subtitle: Advance your expertise with specialized studies

programSections.title: Doctoral & Diploma Programmes
programSections.subtitle: Pursue research and specialized professional training

hero.description: Advancing healthcare through education, research, and clinical excellence. Our programs prepare healthcare professionals to make a meaningful impact on global health.

about.title: About the School
content: The School of Health Sciences is dedicated to developing compassionate, competent, and committed healthcare professionals. Our interdisciplinary approach combines theoretical knowledge with practical skills, ensuring graduates are prepared for the dynamic healthcare landscape.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be a leading institution in health sciences education, research, and service, contributing to improved health outcomes and advancement of global healthcare.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide comprehensive, evidence-based education in health sciences, foster innovation in healthcare practices, and develop professionals committed to community health and wellness.

programPreview.title: Our Programs
programPreview.subtitle: Comprehensive healthcare education across multiple disciplines

faq.question: What are the career prospects after completing a health sciences degree?
faq.answer: Graduates have diverse career opportunities including clinical practice, research, teaching, hospital administration, public health, and healthcare consulting. Our programs are designed to meet national and international healthcare standards.

faq.question: Are there internship and clinical placement opportunities?
faq.answer: Yes, all our programs include mandatory clinical rotations and internships with affiliated hospitals and healthcare centers. This provides hands-on experience with real patient care and healthcare systems.

faq.question: What makes Presidency's health sciences programs unique?
faq.answer: We combine cutting-edge curriculum with practical training, experienced faculty from clinical backgrounds, state-of-the-art laboratories and simulation centers, and strong partnerships with leading healthcare institutions.

faq.question: Can I pursue further studies after my bachelor's degree?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Our bachelor's graduates can pursue master's programs, PhD studies, or specialized certifications in various healthcare disciplines. We offer clear pathways for continuous professional development.

faq.question: What are the admission requirements?
faq.answer: Requirements vary by program. Generally, bachelor's programs require 10+2 with Science. Master's programs require relevant bachelor's degrees. PhD programs require master's degrees with research aptitude. Contact admissions for specific requirements.

hero.description: Master the art and science of rehabilitation. Our BPT program prepares you to diagnose and treat movement disorders, helping patients recover from injuries and improve their quality of life.

overview.title: Program Overview
overview.content: The Bachelor of Physiotherapy program is a comprehensive 4-year course that combines theoretical knowledge with practical skills. Students learn anatomy, physiology, pathology, and therapeutic techniques. The program includes extensive clinical rotations in orthopedics, neurology, cardiopulmonary, and sports physiotherapy.

overview.title: Clinical Training
overview.content: Hands-on experience is crucial. Students work in teaching clinics, community health centers, and affiliated hospitals. Clinical placements span orthopedic, neurological, pediatric, and geriatric settings, ensuring diverse clinical exposure.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.description: Candidates must have completed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology. Merit-based selection through entrance examination. NEET qualification required as per regulatory standards.
eligibility.note: Eligibility may vary for international students. Physical fitness is essential for this program.

Occupational Therapist at rehabilitation centers
Medical Laboratory Technologist at diagnostic labs
Hospital Manager at large hospital chains
Healthcare Operations Manager at clinic networks
Clinical Quality Manager at accredited hospitals
Health Services Administrator at insurance companies
Clinical Researcher at ICMR, AIIMS, NIH
Health Sciences Lecturer at nursing and allied health colleges
Clinical Trial Coordinator at pharma companies
Public Health Researcher at WHO, UNICEF
Sports Physiotherapist at sports teams and academies
Pediatric Nurse Specialist at children's hospitals
Geriatric Occupational Therapist at elder care centers

hero.description: Shape the future of patient care. Our nursing program develops compassionate, skilled nurses who provide quality healthcare across diverse settings and populations.

overview.title: Comprehensive Nursing Education
overview.content: Our B.Sc Nursing program prepares students to provide holistic patient care. The curriculum covers medical-surgical nursing, psychiatric nursing, community health, obstetric and pediatric nursing. Students develop clinical competence, critical thinking, and professional communication skills.

overview.title: Internship & Placements
overview.content: Extensive clinical placements in general hospitals, specialized centers, and community health programs. Students gain experience in patient care, health promotion, and disease prevention across acute and chronic settings.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.description: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (or equivalent). Qualifying score in NEET examination. Physical and mental fitness for nursing practice. Passing in English.
eligibility.note: Applicants from across India and abroad welcome. Age criteria as per regulatory norms.

hero.description: Empower individuals to achieve independence. Our OT program trains therapists to help clients overcome physical, cognitive, and emotional challenges through meaningful activities.

overview.title: Occupational Therapy Fundamentals
overview.content: This program teaches students to use purposeful activities as therapeutic tools. Curriculum covers human anatomy, psychology, pathology, and therapeutic techniques. Students learn to assess functional abilities and design interventions for diverse client populations.

overview.title: Diverse Practice Settings
overview.content: Clinical exposure includes mental health facilities, rehabilitation centers, schools, community programs, and corporate wellness settings. Students work with pediatric, adult, and geriatric populations across various disabilities.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.description: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology. NEET qualification required. Strong interest in healthcare and helping professions. Physical capability to perform therapeutic techniques.
eligibility.note: This program develops professionals to work across healthcare, education, and community sectors.

hero.description: Unlock the secrets of disease diagnosis. Our MLT program trains technologists to perform complex laboratory tests that inform clinical decisions and patient treatment.

overview.title: Laboratory Technology Excellence
overview.content: Students master clinical biochemistry, hematology, microbiology, and immunology. The program emphasizes quality assurance, safety protocols, and modern diagnostic techniques. Training includes both conventional and advanced automated laboratory procedures.

overview.title: Practical Laboratory Experience
overview.content: Extensive practical training in our state-of-the-art laboratory facilities and affiliated diagnostic centers. Students handle diverse samples, operate sophisticated equipment, and ensure accurate results that impact patient care decisions.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.description: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology. Merit-based selection through entrance examination. Strong aptitude for scientific work and laboratory procedures.
eligibility.note: This is a 3-year program with excellent career prospects in hospitals, diagnostic labs, and research centers.

hero.description: Specialize in orthopedic rehabilitation and sports physiotherapy. Develop advanced clinical skills to treat complex musculoskeletal conditions and enhance athletic performance.

overview.title: Advanced Orthopedic Specialization
overview.content: This master's program focuses on musculoskeletal physiotherapy with advanced training in biomechanics, manual therapy, and sports rehabilitation. Students learn evidence-based assessment and treatment techniques for sports injuries, orthopedic conditions, and post-surgical rehabilitation.

overview.title: Research & Clinical Practice
overview.content: Combines advanced clinical practice with research methodology. Students conduct original research on musculoskeletal disorders, participate in sports events, and work with elite athletes. Strong emphasis on evidence-based practice and clinical reasoning.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.description: Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy or related field. Minimum 50% marks in undergraduate studies. Work experience as a physiotherapist is preferred. Entrance examination and interview selection.
eligibility.note: Ideal for physiotherapists seeking specialization in orthopedics and sports medicine.

hero.description: Advance your nursing career with specialized clinical expertise. Our master's program develops nurse leaders and specialists in critical care, medical-surgical, and community health nursing.

overview.title: Clinical Nursing Specialization
overview.content: This program offers specialized clinical knowledge and advanced nursing practice in critical care, medical-surgical nursing, and community health. Students develop expertise in patient assessment, complex clinical decision-making, and evidence-based nursing interventions.

overview.title: Leadership & Research
overview.content: Beyond clinical expertise, students develop leadership skills, research capabilities, and health policy understanding. The program prepares nurse specialists, educators, and administrators equipped to lead healthcare initiatives.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.description: Bachelor's degree in Nursing (B.Sc or B.N). Minimum 55% marks in undergraduate studies. Clinical experience preferred. Selection through entrance examination and interview.
eligibility.note: Excellent for nurses seeking career advancement in clinical leadership and specialization.

hero.description: Conduct groundbreaking research to advance healthcare. Our doctoral program develops researchers who contribute original knowledge to improve health outcomes and healthcare systems.

overview.title: Doctoral Research in Health Sciences
overview.content: This program prepares researchers to conduct original investigations in health sciences. Research areas include clinical healthcare, epidemiology, public health, rehabilitation science, and health systems. Students develop expertise in research methodology, statistical analysis, and scientific writing.

overview.title: Research Support & Collaboration
overview.content: Students work under experienced research mentors with access to laboratory facilities, clinical settings, and research networks. Strong emphasis on publication, conference presentations, and collaboration with national and international institutions.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.description: Master's degree in Health Sciences, Nursing, Physiotherapy, or related field. Minimum 55% marks in master's studies. Clear research interests and motivation. Selection through entrance examination, interview, and research proposal presentation.
eligibility.note: This program is designed for healthcare professionals and scientists pursuing research careers.
